ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the question was posted */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the question was last edited */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the question has received */,
  "answers" INTEGER /* Number of answers the question has received */,
  "is_duplicate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the question is a duplicate */,
  "duplicate_of" INTEGER /* ID of the original question if this is a duplicate */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score reflecting the quality of the question */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the question (e.g., open, closed, merged, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_duplicate_of FOREIGN KEY ("duplicate_of") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score based on contributions */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being analyzed */,
  "q1_len" INTEGER /* Length of the first question */,
  "q2_len" INTEGER /* Length of the second question */,
  "q1_num_words" INTEGER /* Number of words in the first question */,
  "q2_num_words" INTEGER /* Number of words in the second question */,
  "word_common" INTEGER /* Number of common words between the two questions */,
  "word_total" INTEGER /* Total number of unique words in both questions */,
  "word_share" REAL /* Ratio of common words to total words */,
  "is_duplicate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the questions are duplicates */,
  "q1_words" TEXT /* JSON array of words in the first question */,
  "q2_words" TEXT /* JSON array of words in the second question */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Score reflecting the overall similarity between the two questions */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used to compute the similarity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_metrics_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_duplicates" (
  "duplicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duplicate pair */,
  "question_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first question in the pair */,
  "question_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second question in the pair */,
  "is_merged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the questions have been merged */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* Date the questions were merged */,
  "merged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the questions */,
  "merge_reason" TEXT /* Reason for merging the questions */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the duplicate pair */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the duplicate pair was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duplicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_duplicates_merged_by FOREIGN KEY ("merged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_duplicates_question_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("question_id1") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_duplicates_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_duplicates_question_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("question_id2") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the answer is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the answer */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was posted */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was last edited */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the answer has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the answer has received */,
  "is_best_answer" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the answer is the best answer */,
  "accepted_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was accepted as the best answer */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the answer has been edited */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the answer has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is for (either a question or an answer) */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (either 'question' or 'answer') */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has been removed */,
  "removed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who removed the comment */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was removed */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_removed_by FOREIGN KEY ("removed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the vote is for (either a question or an answer) */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (either 'question' or 'answer') */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (either 'upvote' or 'downvote') */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the vote has been removed */,
  "removed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who removed the vote */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_removed_by FOREIGN KEY ("removed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on the number of questions and answers it is associated with */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "question_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-tag relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tag is the primary tag for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of logout */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to log in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post_question, post_answer, edit_question) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., question_performance, user_engagement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report details */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the report has been archived */,
  "archived_date" TEXT /* Date the report was archived */,
  "archived_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who archived the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_archived_by FOREIGN KEY ("archived_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
